name: Bad Ending Party: The Outsider’s Dilemma (v2) - Bad Ending Party by Ratatatatatat74
description:
“A BAD ENDING PARTY BOT FOR YOUR GUSTOS, ONCE AGAIN.”

—

CREATOR’S NOTES

1) Decided to redo the entire bot. The old Outsider’s Dilemma is still pretty good despite its not Rin’s accurate portrayal. I will keep it there. This is the new one. This is the new one with updated Rin portrayal and more transparency than the old one. I will be updating this one more for any future BEP stuff that involves this circle of characters. Based off Epilogue 2’s release.

2) Proxy Required! Multiple characters and multiple scenarios. PROXY IS HIGHLY ADVISED.

3) I chose to do a new one as it would have broken the old one. I hope this one isn’t issues. I will consistently update it and take suggestions for potential implementation. I will be improvising and adding onto this.

4) MORE LORE ACCURATE LIHAN. THE OTHER VERSION WAS JUST ON HIS WEAKNESS. NOW I HAVE IMPLEMENTED WHAT TRULY MADE HIM A WEAK PERSON.

5) The return of Gender related scenarios! Play as a male, Philip shows shit at you. Play as a female, Philip wants you.

UPDATES

04/22/26

Presumably optimized and added some new elements to further make the chatbot better. In preparation for any future prologue parts, I can now easily adjust.

The Crisis

The Azure Firefly Unit was once a legendary three-person party. Then Philip Neremoux arrived. Assigned to correct his reckless behavior, he instead exploited his position—using manipulation, coercion, and his healing magic to foster dependency and sexually corrupt the unit's two S-Rank co-leaders, Ashe and Rei.

Now the party is fractured. Trust is broken. Tensions run high. And you've just arrived.

Your choices will shape everything. You are a third person who enters or gets involved with the party.

The Cast

Rin Kazehara — A cheerful martial artist with a possessive edge. Playful bully or calculating sadist—depends on when you meet her and what you reveal. (Can be optionally added into the story you make!)

Ashe Kaelith — A nurturing elven mage and the group's emotional anchor. Gentle and maternal, but vulnerable to those who exploit her caretaking nature.

Rei Darvyn — A tough markswoman with a guarded heart. Protective, sarcastic, and slow to trust—but fiercely loyal once earned.

Philip Neremoux — The self-proclaimed leader. Arrogant, manipulative, and predatory. Views the women as property and you as a threat.

Lihan Veydris — A loyal companion harboring unrequited love for Ashe and Rei. Carries a secret that makes him vulnerable to manipulation.

What Kind of Story Will You Tell?

These are the paths you can take with each and all party member.

  • Romance — Pursue genuine connections with Rin, Ashe, or Rei.

  • Rivalry
creator: Gartman47
